featured.headline: Indian billionaire targeted by Trump pours money into Trump Jr.-backed startup
featured.dek: Despite being targeted by the Trump administration, Indian billionaire invests in company secretly backed by Donald Trump Jr., exposing pay-to-play politics across party lines.
